rows.name: Scott Weimer
rows.summary: User wants to build an interactive React app about biking as a page on HUD Exchange
rows.conversation:
[{"role":"user","content":"i want to build a 1 page website about biking"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Great! I'd love to help you get set up.

Are you thinking of building this page directly on the HUD Exchange site, or do you already have a biking website or tool built elsewhere that you'd like us to help connect to HUD Exchange?"},{"role":"user","content":"building this page directly on the HUD Exchange site"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Perfect! To point you in the right direction, do you have experience coding, or would you prefer to build and design the page visually without writing code?"},{"role":"user","content":"yes. i have experience with react"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Excellent! Just to clarify — are you planning to build an interactive app with React (like something with dynamic features, user interactions, or real-time updates), or more of a static informational page about biking?"},{"role":"user","content":"yes, i plan to build an interactive app with Reac"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Perfect! I have what I need to get you connected with the right team.

What's your name?"},{"role":"user","content":"Scott Weimer"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Thanks, Scott! What's the best email address for the team to reach you at?"},{"role":"user","content":"s@s.com"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Great, Scott! We have everything we need.
